name: Extract Video Metadata
description: Extract metadata (codec, resolution, duration, bitrate) from MP4 and other video files. All in your browser, no uploads.

privacy.note: SafeWebTool tools are designed to process user data locally in the browser.

howToUse: Drop your video file into the upload area or click to select a file
The tool will automatically extract and display all metadata
View detailed information about video resolution, codec, framerate, and audio properties
useCase: Find out technical details about your videos before uploading, sharing, or editing them.
exampleTasks: Open https://safewebtool.com/video/info and use Extract Video Metadata.
automationNotes: Prefer the stable selectors in this contract over visible text where possible.
Wait for selectors.ready before interacting with the tool UI.
Do not upload private user media to a remote agent service; operate the browser-local UI instead.
